column1: # Media wishes for the App Store demo server. Tab-separated.
# Each row is a single media wish added by `viewer` and, optionally,
# given an admin acquisition status. The mix of statuses is what
# makes the wishlist + purchase-wishes screenshots visually rich
# (Ordered / Rejected / Not Available / no-status all in one shot).
#   tmdb_id        TMDB id of the title. Does NOT need to be in the
#                  demo catalog — the wishlist supports wishes for
#                  not-yet-owned media. Verify each id on themoviedb.org.
#   title          Display name. Stored on the wish row directly
#                  alongside the TMDB id (the SPA shows it before
#   release_year   Year — also stored on the wish row.
#   admin_status   AcquisitionStatus enum value, or blank to leave
# Lines beginning with '#' or blank are ignored.
